title: これはいわゆる照れでしてっ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished my work for the morning, I'm out
for a stroll and enjoying the sunny day, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey there. All finished up? Are you headed
anywhere special?
choice_data_list:
Nowhere in particular. Just enjoying the
weather.

Nowhere in particular. Just enjoying the
weather.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I totally get it. Days like this are perfect for going out. Sigh... Now I want to go somewhere too...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy! Well, ain't this a nice coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyah! Who's that?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Taiki? You look sad... Did something
happen?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh, so your friends canceled your plans to go to the mountain stream, huh? That is a bummer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they said some important stuff came up
that they have to wrap, so what can you do?
choice_data_list: Do you mean wrap up? Either way, it's a shame your plans fell through.
Do you mean wrap up? Either way, it's a shame your plans fell through.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's great bein' able to vent when you're feeling
blue. I'm so happy y'all were here to lend me an
ear!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, bring it on in for a big thank-you hug!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Eeek! N-n-n-now hold on a second!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, my bad, Tannhauser! ...Not a hugger?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah... no! That's not it! It's just that... well, how do I
put this? It's not like I don't like being hugged! It's
just, uh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems less like she hates hugs and more that
she was just caught off guard—and feels a little
embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, Matikanetannhauser has got herself
worked up over it, so I change the subject in an
attempt to calm her down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that they go to the mountain stream
together. Matikanetannhauser wants a day out as
well, so it should kill two birds with one stone.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That sounds like a mighty fine idea! Let's do
it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, o-okay! If you're cool with hanging out with
me, then sure! I'll go wherever.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn right I'm cool hanging out with you! We're
gonna have ourselves a ball!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Man! Taiki's so nice! She says that even though
she might've really been hurt by my reaction to
her hug...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(But I was just a little embarrassed, that's all.
Taiki is so straightforward with her feelings, it
made me freeze up...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Gyaah! I really messed up! I should be grateful to
that trainer for sorting out my dumb mistake.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (I'll definitely return the favor someday!)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Why don't you join us, Trainer? The more
the merrier!
choice_data_list:
Let me know ahead of time and I'll clear my
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Great!
I'm not one bit sad now! Hehe! Thanks a million,
Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'll show you how well I can take a hug!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser seems motivated, though it
appears she might still be hung up about the hug.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What we oughta do is have us a barbecue!
Meat and veggies are extra tasty fresh off the
grill!
choice_data_list: Why don't you invite some more people too?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now you're talkin'! I'm sure we can round us up a
few more heads! I'll get right on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle hurtles off in the blink of an eye. I'm
watching her shrink into the distance, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Okay, Taiki! The thing about the hug is
that it just caught me off guard! So... huh?! Taiki?
Taikiii!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is already gone, but
Matikanetannhauser putters around for a little
while looking for her.
